set.body: Nothing today visualizes or summarizes benchmark runs. tools/benchmark-results/ has ~1,830 rows of archived data that is write-only. This phase adds a cold/warm delta column, generates a per-run markdown+plot summary, and uploads it as a CI artifact from nightly-stress.yaml. Depends on P1 (needs per-rep sd/CI and history file).
set.title: P3: Per-run reporting and CI artifacts
